name: parrotpod
description: Parrot Pod AI Voice Agent Builder

scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,VOICE,BROWSER" -c "blue,green,magenta,white" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:voice" "npx wait-on http://localhost:3000 && start http://localhost:3000"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev:voice: cd backend && uv run python voice_agent.py dev
